plans.notes: Official CTI challenge page states 10K 1-Step challenge price $76 discounted from $109, 8% profit target, $500 max drawdown, minimum 3 profitable days, no time limit, balance-based drawdown, news trading allowed, and up to 100% profit share.

Official CTI challenge page snippet shows 10K 2-Step challenge price $97 discounted from $139. CTI drawdown mechanics page states 2-Step uses 5% daily loss and 10% absolute drawdown on a $100K example, both balance-based; challenge page says no time limit and news trading allowed.
Official StartTrader page states it is a 3-phase evaluation, with a $5,000 plan and instant payouts. Fintokei homepage states StartTrader accounts up to $100,000 and price from $44.
Official Fintokei homepage states SwiftTrader is a 1-step evaluation, accounts up to $200,000, performance reward 100%, and price from $99.

plans.ea_restrictions: Official page shows $109 price, 10% target, 5% daily drawdown, 10% max drawdown, balance-based, unlimited duration, minimum 4 trading days, and news trading/holding yes.
Official page shows $319 price, 10% target, 5% daily drawdown, 10% max drawdown, balance-based, unlimited duration, and news trading/holding yes.

plans.notes: Official FXIFY Instant Funding page states no evaluation, no targets, payouts every 14 days, up to 90% performance split, and account sizes up to $50K.
Official FXIFY homepage states $250 for a $5K One Phase account, first withdrawal on demand, unlimited days, up to 90% performance split, EAs allowed, and hold over weekend.
